verses.2: A good man shall obtain favor from the LORD,
verses.3: A man shall not be established by wickedness,
verses.4: A worthy woman is the crown of her husband,
verses.5: The thoughts of the righteous are just,
verses.6: The words of the wicked are about lying in wait for blood,
verses.7: The wicked are overthrown, and are no more,
verses.8: A man shall be commended according to his wisdom,
verses.9: Better is he who is little known, and has a servant,
verses.10: A righteous man respects the life of his animal,
verses.11: He who tills his land shall have plenty of bread,
verses.12: The wicked desires the plunder of evil men,
verses.13: An evil man is trapped by sinfulness of lips,
verses.14: A man shall be satisfied with good by the fruit of his mouth.
verses.15: The way of a fool is right in his own eyes,
verses.16: A fool shows his annoyance the same day,
verses.17: He who is truthful testifies honestly,
verses.18: There is one who speaks rashly like the piercing of a sword,
verses.19: Truth’s lips will be established forever,
verses.20: Deceit is in the heart of those who plot evil,
verses.21: No mischief shall happen to the righteous,
verses.22: Lying lips are an abomination to the LORD,
verses.23: A prudent man keeps his knowledge,
verses.24: The hands of the diligent ones shall rule,
verses.25: Anxiety in a man’s heart weighs it down,
verses.26: A righteous person is cautious in friendship,
verses.27: The slothful man doesn’t roast his game,
verses.28: In the way of righteousness is life;
